title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and React from scratch to become a full-stack developer.

title: Python for Data Science and Machine Learning
description: Master Python, Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-Learn to build predictive machine learning models.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: User research, wireframing, prototyping, and visual design principles using Figma and Adobe XD.

title: Ultimate Digital Marketing Masterclass
description: Grow your business or career using SEO, Google Ads, Facebook Marketing, and copywriting.

title: Advanced Java and Spring Boot Microservices
description: Build scalable, production-ready microservices using Spring Cloud, Docker, and Kubernetes.

title: Financial Trading and Technical Analysis
description: Learn to read candlestick charts, identify trends, and manage risk in stock and crypto markets.

title: Introduction to Cyber Security & Ethical Hacking
description: Understand network security, penetration testing, and how to defend systems against major vulnerabilities.

title: Creative Photography and Adobe Lightroom Mastery
description: Master camera settings, composition, and professional photo editing workflows.
